intent.raw: Validate if Refine is needed so we can implement the form, the database, and the safety; confirmed focused Refine run.
intent.objective: Produce an implementation-ready, non-executed plan for the Time Capsule live form, intake database, and safety architecture without authorizing real data, cryptography, deployment, token state, or launch.
intent.target_artifact: Time Capsule live intake implementation-readiness package
intent.operator_sentence: Refine the form, database, and safety plan before implementation.

route_menu.context_hint: The existing static form is L0-ready, while the database and safety layers remain unresolved.

items.label: Static form only
items.description: Skip Refine and route the existing non-collecting form SWUs to Task Session.

items.label: Focused live intake
items.description: Refine the form API, database, data lifecycle, and safety boundaries while preserving the existing product concept.

items.label: Full capsule and token mechanism
items.description: Re-open supply selection, beacon, token engineering, ceremony, and launch; broader than the implementation question.

technique_overlays.trigger: The canonical ten-stage Refine loop requires explicit owner handoffs, evidence receipts, and completeness checks.
technique_overlays.validation_expectation: Every stage consumes a prior artifact, returns a receipt or blocker, and preserves capability ownership.

technique_overlays.trigger: Static-form execution, focused intake refinement, and full mechanism refinement are materially different routes.
technique_overlays.validation_expectation: The focused live-intake route remains selected and broader token or launch scope remains deferred.

technique_overlays.trigger: Inviting participation, durable storage, privacy minimization, moderation, and long-term recoverability can conflict.
technique_overlays.validation_expectation: Product, data, and safety objections remain visible until explicitly reconciled, deferred, or blocked.

technique_overlays.trigger: The application boundary, database lifecycle, credential session, and sealed-content posture have multiple viable options.
technique_overlays.validation_expectation: Alternatives record assumptions, elimination conditions, rejected options, and why the selected unit recomposes.

technique_overlays.trigger: The visible form hides trust boundaries, sensitive state, owner dependencies, and release-time data flows.
technique_overlays.validation_expectation: The existing architecture X-Ray is consumed by handle and the design emits explicit data/trust-boundary artifacts.

technique_overlays.trigger: Real intake is unsafe; invented-data scenarios can falsify transaction, consent, abuse, loss, and recovery assumptions first.
technique_overlays.validation_expectation: The plan names synthetic attack fixtures and interprets failure as a block, repair, or killed feature.

technique_overlays.trigger: Future credentials, words, commitments, keys, moderation records, and incident evidence are sensitive even though this run uses no real data.
technique_overlays.validation_expectation: Sensitive fields and state namespaces are explicit; no generated artifact treats them as public or canonical by default.

subagent_strategy.trigger: Three independent high-risk surfaces must review the same corpus before parent synthesis.
subagent_strategy.explanation: Role-bound reviewers reduce product-only, database-only, and security-only blind spots while keeping the parent responsible for reconciliation and final approval.
context: The static form is planned but the production application surface is unresolved.
The test backend is limited to invented data and in-memory or isolated state.
Real public intake and sealed intake have different owners and safety gates.
The user explicitly approved the three role-bound subagents.

roles.purpose: Attack participant comprehension, voluntariness, accessibility, consent, and honest copy.
roles.owns: read-only form and participant-journey review receipt

roles.purpose: Attack API, transaction, state, retention, backup, migration, and recovery assumptions.
roles.owns: read-only backend and database review receipt

roles.purpose: Attack privacy, security, abuse, moderation, incident, custody, and stewardship claims.
roles.owns: read-only safety and threat-boundary review receipt

subagent_strategy.permission_prompt: Confirmed by the operator on 2026-07-17: run the focused Refine strategy including all three role-bound subagents.

validation: static repairs and live blockers carried into CR-01 through CR-22
agents.residue: No comprehension, Unicode/IME, assistive-technology, close, recovery, or release-consent evidence has run.
agents.handoff_note: Accepted into parent synthesis without implying live authorization.

validation: reliability requirements carried into architecture and work-pack
agents.residue: Production stack and data-lifecycle owners remain unselected.
agents.handoff_note: Accepted into parent synthesis as live blockers, not stack selection.

validation: public and sealed live gates remain independent
agents.residue: Sealed mode retains low-entropy, client, custody, recovery, migration, and survivor blockers.
agents.handoff_note: Accepted into parent synthesis without selecting a cryptographic profile.

validation: actors, data classes, guarantees, non-guarantees, and owners explicit
34 raw findings reconciled to 22 accepted change requests
no external research needed for local owner decisions or unrun evidence
public and sealed live gates remain independent
blockers: live owner and evidence gates remain unresolved

validation: repair obligations fit bounded plan units
four layers, seven tasks, thirteen SWUs
blockers: BL-01 through BL-07 block assigned later layers

native_stage_receipts.handoff_note: Interrogation verified closure; Refine synthesized RESULT.md with an overall flag.

steps.name: Context Builder Evidence Baseline
stop_conditions: Any implementation obligation lacks a source, explicit gap, owner, or deferred status.

steps.name: Invoke Define
stop_conditions: The live-intake problem, actors, data classes, guarantees, non-guarantees, or owners remain undefined.

steps.name: Interrogation Refine Review
convergence_criteria: Every reviewer returns a cited receipt.
Conflicting findings are accepted, refuted, deferred, or routed.
stop_conditions: A finding claims readiness without evidence.

steps.name: Research Decision
stop_conditions: External research is needed but lacks a named gap and explicit operator confirmation.

steps.name: Distill Coherent Implementation Unit
convergence_criteria: One smallest coherent unit closes under synthetic data.
Rejected alternatives and elimination conditions are recorded.
The unit recomposes into later public and sealed paths.
stop_conditions: Every candidate requires real sensitive data or an unresolved owner decision.

steps.name: Invoke Redefine And Design
stop_conditions: The design conflates static, synthetic, public-live, or sealed-live states.
A safety or authority boundary has no owner or fail behavior.

steps.name: Interrogation Design Review
convergence_criteria: Every critical or major review finding is represented in the design, rejected with evidence, or retained as owned residue.
No reconciliation weakens the static, synthetic, public-live, or sealed-live capability boundaries.
stop_conditions: Any critical review finding is absent from the design or gap ledger.

steps.name: Distill Repair
stop_conditions: Repair would invent an owner decision, cryptographic guarantee, or production-readiness claim.

steps.name: Invoke Plan
stop_conditions: A work unit lacks write scope, validation, receipt, owner gate, or safe-data classification.

steps.name: Final Interrogation And Refine Synthesis
stop_conditions: Any pass claim lacks an artifact.
The plan implies live intake authorization.
A spawned agent remains open or unjoined.

gates.condition: REFINE-DISPATCH.json passes deterministic schema and semantic validation before stage execution.
Focused Refine and three role-bound reviewers were explicitly confirmed.
Two independent tension checkers pass the review sheet before dispatch registration.
Every canonical stage has an artifact or exact blocked reason and native receipt fields.
External research runs only after a named gap and a separate explicit confirmation.
Research artifacts do not become implementation, security, privacy, token, governance, or launch authority by proximity.
No plan step accepts real credentials, words, sealed content, keys, or moderation records without its later owner gate and evidence.
Every spawned reviewer is joined and closed with a receipt before final synthesis.
Implementation begins only through an explicitly authorized bounded SWU after Refine closes.

boundaries.contract: Reviewers read the frozen local packet and write cited findings only; parent owns reconciliation and final approval.
No external context is acquired without a named gap and explicit confirmation; external evidence cannot override local authority.
This run may specify but cannot create or accept real credentials, words, commitments, ciphertext, keys, receipts, analytics, or incident records.
The final plan is non-executed; every implementation SWU requires separate authorization.

authority.lifecycle: refine owns this run; target product owners own later decisions
authority.validation: dispatch-spec, stage capabilities, reviewers, and parent checks
authority.evidence: run-local artifacts and append-only dispatch receipts
authority.memory: inventory and observability are non-authority read models
authority.promotion: repository authority and named product/security/privacy/content/archive owners

state_namespaces.write_policy: Write only under this run folder.
Append exactly one dispatch and one close row; never edit prior rows.

promotion_splits.rule: A non-executed plan can nominate SWUs but cannot authorize them.
Findings expose gaps; only named owners can accept residual risk or approve a profile.
Visibility and telemetry do not promote candidate knowledge or policy.

promotion_guardrails: No solved, safe, private, fair, production-ready, or launch-ready claim without its named evidence and owner.
The capsule module cannot mint, allocate, rank, reward, grant membership, or assign governance power.
Static, synthetic, real-public, and real-sealed capability states remain distinct.
The sealed feature may be killed; access control is never substituted for encryption.
Inventory and observability are evidence projections, not authority.
